chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Saleem Jessar Mr. Justice Nisar Ahmed Bhanbhro Constitution Petition No. D-2046 of 2026 (Muhammad Shamsuddin Khan v. President & CEO of PT&T and others) Petitioner: Through Dr. Tahir Rasheed, Advocate Respondents: N.R Date of hearing and order: 15.04.2026 ORDER Muhammad Saleem Jessar, J:- Through this petition, the petitioner has prayed for following relief:-  To appoint Nazir of Court to take within 3 days all dues amount from the Respondent No.1 USD 800 Million with 22% interest from due period 2005 to 2010, not paid to GOP, if not, prayed to order comply Paras 5 & 6 immediately and within seven days dues to give Petitioner and all other affected. 2. When confronted with the question of maintainability of this petition, inasmuch as the petitioner has raised issues pertaining to the years 2005 and 2010 involving disputed questions of fact, which cannot be adjudicated by this Court in its writ jurisdiction, the petitioner failed to satisfy or dispel the queries put by this Court. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in limine, being misconceived and not maintainable. Judge Head of Const. Benches Judge B-K Soomro
